ham.subject: Your Flight Itinerary – Confirmation for Flight AB123
ham.body:
Dear Rajesh,

Thank you for booking with Air India. Your flight details are confirmed as follows:

• Flight: AB123
• Date: 12/08/2026
• Departure: Delhi (DEL) at 10:45 AM
• Arrival: Mumbai (BOM) at 12:30 PM
• Seat: 12A (Aisle)
• Boarding Time: 10:15 AM
• Gate: 12

Please arrive at the airport at least 2 hours before departure. Attach the e-ticket below for reference.

If you need to change your booking or have any questions, contact our support at support@airindia.com.

Safe travels!

Best Regards,
Air India Customer Service

spam.subject: Urgent: Immediate Action Required – Your Zoom Meeting Invite
spam.body:
Dear Rajesh,

We hope you are doing well. You have been invited to a mandatory Zoom meeting by the Compliance Department of XYZ Corp. The meeting is scheduled for tomorrow, 13/08/2026, at 09:00 AM IST. This session is critical to discuss the new regulatory standards and your role in ensuring compliance.

Please join the meeting using the link below:
<URL>

If you are unable to attend, please notify the Compliance team immediately at compliance@xyzcorp.com. Failure to attend may result in a compliance audit.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best,

Kavita Sharma
Compliance Officer
XYZ Corp
